info.title: Antyrama.Tools.Scribe.Cli
info.description: Service configuration file generator Command Line Tools

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates JSON .NET app settings consumable by Azure DevOps step (AzureAppServiceSettings@1) configuring your app service. Configuration could be also wrapped in a YAML file as variables.

options.name: --assembly
options.description:
Required. Startup assembly file path and name. Can
be obtained by $(OutputPath)\$(AssemblyName).dll

options.name: --providers
options.description:
(Default: JsonConfigurationProvider) A list of
configuration providers from which all setting
keys are taken. All types derived from
'IConfigurationProvider'

options.name: --include
options.description:
(Default: ) A list of keys to include despite of
providers list configuration. Example:
Logging:LogLevel:Microsoft.AspNetCore

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
(Default: ) A list of keys to exclude from all
collected settings. Example:

options.name: --to-yaml
options.description:
(Default: false) Indicates whether configuration
wrapped in YAML Azure DevOps variables file

options.name: --file-path-template
options.description:
(Default: ./configuration.json) File name template
for output. Template may contain a placeholder for
environment name. Example: configuration.{0}.json

options.name: --environments
options.description:
(Default: ) A list of environment names. Separate
configuration file will be created per each
environment. Required when file name template
contains placeholder.

options.name: --eol
options.description:
End-of-line delimiter, possible values: Cr, CrLf
or Lf, by default operating system end-of-line
will be used.
